summary: Comprehensive testing of Pantry Pulse app with three new features: barcode scanning, expiry notifications, and meal planning. Backend achieved 96% success rate, frontend testing confirmed all new features working correctly in UI.

minor_issues.issue: Dashboard title check failed after navigation - likely text selector issue
Page stuck on loading screen during additional testing

passed_tests: Barcode lookup - valid Coca-Cola barcode (5449000000996) returns 'Original Taste'
Barcode lookup - invalid barcode (0000000000000) returns found:false
Expiry notifications endpoint returns proper structure with count
Meal plan CRUD operations (GET, POST, DELETE individual, DELETE all)
AI meal plan generation works (15-30 second response time)
Scanner page loads with 3 tabs: Barcode, Photo, Receipt
Barcode tab has Start Camera button and manual input field
Manual barcode lookup works in UI and shows product info
Meal Planner page loads with Generate Week button
AI meal plan generation works in UI
Notification bell appears in navbar and opens dropdown
Dashboard loads correctly with user greeting
All existing features still functional (pantry, recipes, scanning, grocery, profile, stats)
